package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_called_after_materializing_channel: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag channel streams collected into slices only to measure length or emptiness.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule515PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario515Positive(records []Rule515PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
